/usr/bin/ar qc libmicroops.a CMakeFiles/microops.dir/libs/microops/src/alu/sub.c.o CMakeFiles/microops.dir/libs/microops/src/alu/add.c.o CMakeFiles/microops.dir/libs/microops/src/alu/mul.c.o CMakeFiles/microops.dir/libs/microops/src/alu/div.c.o CMakeFiles/microops.dir/libs/microops/src/logic/xor.c.o CMakeFiles/microops.dir/libs/microops/src/logic/and.c.o CMakeFiles/microops.dir/libs/microops/src/logic/or.c.o CMakeFiles/microops.dir/libs/microops/src/logic/not.c.o CMakeFiles/microops.dir/libs/microops/src/memory/mov.c.o CMakeFiles/microops.dir/libs/microops/src/flow/cmp.c.o CMakeFiles/microops.dir/libs/microops/src/stack/push.c.o CMakeFiles/microops.dir/libs/microops/src/stack/pop.c.o CMakeFiles/microops.dir/libs/microops/src/memory/jmp.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmicroops.a
